description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the continuumio/miniconda3:latest Docker image, with a cache on $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.conda_cache and $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.apt-cache. Define three stages: test, test_conda_build, and gitlab-release. In the test stage add a test job that runs the global before_script (conda install -c conda-forge mamba; mamba update -y -n base conda; mamba install conda-build; apt-get update; apt-get -o dir::cache::archives=".apt-cache" install -y texlive-lang-german texlive-xetex texlive-fonts-extra texlive-science; bash gitlab-ci.sh; source activate $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.conda_cache/mapping-4; pip install -e .) then executes "cd test" and "./test_mapping.py", and runs only on branches unstable_development and master. In the test_conda_build stage add a test_conda_build job that inherits the same global before_script and then runs "cd .conda && conda build . -c conda-forge -c bioconda", and runs only on tags test_conda_build and stage_conda_release. In the gitlab-release stage add a make_new_release job with its own before_script (apt-get update; apt-get -y install software-properties-common; apt-get update; apt-get -y install php php-json git openssh-client curl), runs only on master, and executes commands to set VERSION=$(git tag | grep -E 'v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | tail -n1), DESCRIPTION=$(git cat-file -p $VERSION), MESSAGE=$(php -r "echo json_encode(['name' => '$VERSION', 'tag_name' => '$VERSION', 'description' => '$DESCRIPTION']);"), echo $MESSAGE, and curl --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" --data "$MESSAGE" --request POST ${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/releases.
